info.title: Voice Changer: AI Voice Change
info.description:
Welcome to Voice Changer, the great AI-powered voice transformation app designed for creativity and fun! Whether you're a content creator seeking professional voiceovers, a prankster planning hilarious voice jokes, or someone exploring AI voice technology, Voice Changer delivers tools to change voices effortlessly. With features like AI voice change & recorde and text-to-speech, this app opens up a world of possibilities for audio and video projects. Our intuitive interface ensures that anyone can achieve stunning results with just a few taps—no technical skills required. Plus, with strong privacy protections, your data stays safe while you create.

Key Features​
AI Voice Changer & Recorder: Record your voice in real-time and apply fun or professional effects. Switch between male or female voices instantly.
Text-to-Speech (TTS): Type text and convert it to natural-sounding speech using 100+ voice options. Ideal for videos, audiobooks, or language learning.
Audio File Changer: Select an audio file and change the voice using your selected effect. 
Video Voice Changer: Modify voices in your videos without affecting video quality. Good for dubbing or adding creative voice effects.
Favorites Collection: Save your best voice creations to a “Favorites” folder for quick access and easy management.
Share Functionality: Export and share audio or video files directly to social media, messaging apps.

Why Choose Voice Changer?​
Wide Voice Library: Provide over 100 voice options, our ever-growing library offers something for every scenario.
User-Friendly Design: Simple tools and a clean layout make voice editing accessible to everyone.

Ideal For​
Content creators adding voiceovers to videos, podcasts, or ads
Pranksters creating fake voice messages or funny clips
Social media users personalizing content with unique voices
Educators and students making engaging audio materials

Use Voice Changer Today!​
Join users who trust Voice Changer for AI voice innovation. Transform your sound now and start creating!
Disclaimer: Voice Changer uses AI for voice simulation. Results may vary, and users are encouraged to apply the tool responsibly and ethically.

Support:
For questions or suggestions, contact us at xiangdong.li.ldx@gmail.com
info.summary: Change your voice with AI. Record, share, and change voices for audio, video.
